contact.address: Hit Yatra Travel Services, Vrindavan, India

hero.title: Experience the Divine Bliss of Braj Bhoomi
hero.subtitle: Hit Yatra brings you the most sacred and breathtaking journeys across Vrindavan and Mathura.

faq.question: How do I book a Hit Yatra package?
faq.answer: You can fill out the inquiry form on any package or contact us directly on our Instagram or via WhatsApp at +91-9737797935.

faq.question: Do the tour packages include Mahaprasad?
faq.answer: Yes, our packages include authentic Vrindavan Mahaprasad for meals, giving you a complete spiritual experience.

faq.question: Is transport from Mathura station included?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide comfortable AC transport from Mathura Junction to all prime temples in Vrindavan and Govardhan.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: The Vrindavan tour organized by Hit Yatra was incredibly peaceful. Everything from the hotel to the temple visits was perfectly managed.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: Excellent service and deep cultural insights into Krishna's pastimes. Highly recommend Hit Yatra!

testimonials.name: Ananya Desai
testimonials.text: The Govardhan Parikrama arrangement was seamless. Their guides truly understand the essence of Braj Bhoomi.
